defmodule MyApp.Access do
  def check(user) do
    unless allowed?(user) do
      raise "forbidden"
    else
      proceed(user)
    end
  end
end

defmodule MyApp.Access do
  def check(user) do
    if allowed?(user) do
      proceed(user)
    else
      raise "forbidden"
    end
  end
end

defmodule MyApp.Access do
  def warn_if_locked(user) do
    unless user.active? do
      Logger.warning("locked user #{user.id}")
    end
  end
end
